message:
refactor: Split float_ops.zig into modular directory structure

Split 1394-line float_ops.zig into focused submodules:
- arithmetic.zig (92 lines) - basic math ops
- rounding.zig (204 lines) - floor/ceil/trunc/round
- ratio.zig (173 lines) - as_integer_ratio
- hex.zig (109 lines) - hex formatting
- conversion.zig (163 lines) - type conversions
- parsing.zig (266 lines) - string parsing with Unicode
- builtins.zig (253 lines) - float()/bool() builtins

Main file now 71-line re-export module for backwards compatibility.
